objectives: Verify that the hooks and LangGraph summarizer system is working as expected
Verify implementation of the hooks system evaluation plan
Address remaining issues identified during verification
Verify implementation of the Structured Data Output plan (structured_3308c639.plan.md)
Confirm all 10 completed plan items are properly implemented with evidence
Verify implementation of the conversation-level summarization plan
Fix identified bugs in the conversation summarizer agent

decisions.decision: Created a dedicated check_status.py diagnostic script
decisions.reason: Repeated shell command failures made one-liner debugging inefficient

decisions.decision: Consolidate duplicate _truncate functions into shared truncate() utility
decisions.reason: Eliminate code duplication across 8 files and centralize truncation logic
decisions.alternatives_considered: Keep local implementations or create a new shared module

decisions.reason: Prevent daemon from being killed/restarted on every stop; lifecycle should be managed by session_start and session_end only
decisions.alternatives_considered: Keep force trigger with conditional logic

decisions.decision: Fix missing debug_log import and regenerate state field
decisions.reason: Prevent NameError crashes on error paths and ensure type consistency with CLI/state routing logic
decisions.alternatives_considered: Define debug_log locally or rely on TypedDict total=False; opted for importing existing utility and explicit typing for maintainability

errors_encountered.error: PowerShell '&&' is not a valid statement separator
errors_encountered.context: Shell command used bash-style && instead of PowerShell ;
Attempted cd into hooks-debug.log instead of its parent directory
errors_encountered.resolution: Corrected to cd into the hooks directory

errors_encountered.error: sqlite3.OperationalError: no such column: status / summary
errors_encountered.context: Assumed incorrect column names in narratives.db
errors_encountered.resolution: Used PRAGMA table_info to discover actual schema: session_id, narrative, generated_at, strategy, word_count, event_count_at_summary

errors_encountered.error: File not found: hooks.json at assumed path
errors_encountered.context: Agent tried to read hooks.json at .cursor/hooks/hooks.json but it did not exist there
errors_encountered.resolution: Used grep to locate the file at .cursor/hooks.json instead

errors_encountered.error: PowerShell syntax errors in shell commands
errors_encountered.context: Used '&&' as command separator and 'head' for output truncation, which are not valid in PowerShell
errors_encountered.resolution: Switched to ';' for command chaining and 'Select-Object -First N' for output limiting

errors_encountered.context: Used in error handling paths in conversation_summarizer_agent.py but never imported or defined
errors_encountered.resolution: Added debug_log to imports from conversation_recorder

errors_encountered.context: TypedDict declared force but not regenerate, despite CLI and state logic using it
errors_encountered.resolution: Explicitly added regenerate: bool to the TypedDict definition

code_patterns: SQLite schema introspection via PRAGMA table_info
Extracted shared utility function to eliminate duplication
Replaced local _truncate calls with imported truncate
Evidence-based verification: grep for existence, shell for runtime validation, file reads for content inspection
Systematic checklist-driven verification against plan items
Explicit TypedDict field declaration for state consistency
Cross-module utility import for error logging
open_questions: SQLite schema differs from assumed column names (narrative vs summary, no status column)
Implementation of large conversation chunking logic (50+ sessions) remains pending
Full verification of remaining plan phases not completed in this session
outcome: Two critical bugs in the conversation summarizer agent were fixed; plan verification completed with chunking logic deferred.
